gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/202)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/202)
text: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ الْكِبْرُ قَدْ يَكُونُ فِي شِرَارِ النَّاسِ مِنْ كُلِّ جِنْسٍ وَ الْكِبْرُ رِدَاءُ اللَّهِ فَمَنْ نَازَعَ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ رِدَاءَهُ لَمْ يَزِدْهُ اللَّهُ إِلَّا سَفَالًا

إِنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مَرَّ فِي بَعْضِ طُرُقِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَ سَوْدَاءُ تَلْقُطُ السِّرْقِينَ فَقِيلَ لَهَا تَنَحَّيْ عَنْ طَرِيقِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ فَقَالَتْ إِنَّ الطَّرِيقَ لَمُعْرَضٌ فَهَمَّ بِهَا بَعْضُ الْقَوْمِ أَنْ يَتَنَاوَلَهَا فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) دَعُوهَا فَإِنَّهَا جَبَّارَةٌ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Al Husayn Bin Abu Al A’ala,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I heard him<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘The arrogance has happened to be in the evil people from every race, and the Pride is a Gown of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>. So whoever disputes with Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic about His<sup>azwj</sup> Gown, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> would not Increase him in except for the lowliness.

Rasool-Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> passed by one of the streets of Al-Medina and a black lady was scooping up the manure. So it was said to her, ‘Move aside from the way of Rasool-Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup>!’ So she said, ‘The road is open (wide enough)’. So, some of the people thought of grabbing her (and pushing her aside). So Rasool-Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> said: ‘Leave her, for she is tyrannial’ (bully).
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Ali ibn al-Hakam from al-Husayn ibn abu al-‘Ala’ who has said the following: “I heard abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) saying, ‘Arrogance can be found in mischievous people of all sexes. Pride is the gown of Allah. Therefore, whoever disputes Allah, the Majestic, the Glorious, about His gown; it will only bring him low. Once, the Messenger of Allah was passing through one of the streets of Madina. On the way there was a black lady collecting manure (to fuel fire). She was told to move to the side to clear the way for the Messenger of Allah. She said, ‘The road is wide.’ Certain individuals wanted to push her aside but the Messenger of Allah said, ‘Leave her alone, she is a bully.’”
